summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of new Employee Management form and table features. All 16 features listed in the review request were tested and passed. The Add Employee dialog has all fields, conditional fields work correctly, the مكلف toggle integrates with monthly schedule, ZoneEmployeesTab filters admin employees correctly, and all statistics cards work.

ui_bugs.issue: statistics.fieldOps = mergedEmployees.filter(e=>e.work_type==='field'||e.work_type==='both').length does NOT apply the || 'field' default. For pre-existing employees created before work_type field was added (work_type=null in DB), fieldOps will show 0. The WorkTypeBadge correctly defaults to 'field' but statistics don't.
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - Currently not an issue since بسام's work_type is now 'field' in DB

design_issues.screen: Add Employee dialog - work type buttons
issues: The 'both' option label is 'إداري/ميداني' (with slash). Review request specified 'إداري+ميداني' (with plus). Minor label difference, not a functional issue.

features_verified: ✅ Employee Management page loads without crashing
✅ Add Employee dialog opens with all new fields: name, employee_number, job_title, contact_phone
✅ work_type selector shows 3 options: ميداني / إداري / إداري/ميداني (3 toggle buttons)
✅ employment_type selector shows 3 options: دائم / موسمي / مؤقت (3 toggle buttons)
✅ Selecting 'موسمي' shows season dropdown (رمضان/حج/عمرة) AND contract_end date
✅ Selecting 'مؤقت' shows ONLY contract_end date input (no season dropdown)
✅ Selecting 'دائم' shows amber note about is_tasked being managed via monthly schedule
✅ Employee table shows: colored avatar (employment-type color), WorkTypeBadge (ميداني), EmpTypeBadge (دائم), contact_phone with phone icon
✅ مكلف column appears ONLY when monthly schedule exists (conditional rendering)
✅ مكلف toggle (✓ button) shows for permanent employees; — for seasonal/temporary
✅ Clicking مكلف toggle calls handleAssignmentChange → updates is_tasked in monthly schedule via API
✅ Statistics cards show permanent/seasonal/temporary breakdown in total card
✅ Statistics show field ops count (ميدانيون) and tasked count sub-stat
✅ ZoneEmployeesTab: admin employees (work_type=admin) are filtered out from distribution panel
✅ ZoneEmployeesTab panel header shows 'متاحون للتوزيع: 2' (field employees only)
✅ ZoneEmployeesTab panel header shows 'إداريون مخفيون: 1' when admin employees exist
action_items: LOW: Consider fixing statistics fieldOps to apply default: `mergedEmployees.filter(e=>(e.work_type||'field')==='field'||e.work_type==='both').length` to handle pre-existing employees with work_type=null
LOW: Decide if 'both' work type label should be 'إداري+ميداني' or 'إداري/ميداني' (current is slash)
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: EmployeeManagement.jsx line 460: statistics.fieldOps filter doesn't apply || 'field' default for null work_type. Fix: (e.work_type||'field')==='field' || e.work_type==='both'
NOTE: EmployeeCreate model has is_tasked: bool = False but the frontend form doesn't expose it (correct - managed via monthly schedule). No issue.
NOTE: ZoneEmployeesTab hardcodes department=plazas for employee fetch (line 190). This is by design for plazas context.
seed_data_creation: Created test employees TEST-001 (field/permanent) and TEST-ADM-001 (admin/permanent) during testing, then deleted both. Created and deleted a plazas schedule for 2026-03. Original employee بسام اسماعيل غزاوي (e0dadb33) restored to its original state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new employee management features are working end-to-end: 1) Add dialog with work_type/employment_type toggle buttons, conditional seasonal/temporary fields, 2) مكلف toggle integrated with monthly schedule, 3) ZoneEmployeesTab admin filtering with متاحون للتوزيع/إداريون مخفيون headers. Employee بسام (e0dadb33) has work_type='field', employment_type='permanent', is_active=True set in DB. No schedule exists for plazas/2026-03 after cleanup.

rca_of_issues.fieldOps_null_work_type: EmployeeManagement.jsx line 460: statistics.fieldOps uses strict equality check (work_type==='field') without applying the || 'field' default. For employees with work_type=null (created before the work_type feature was added), this would show 0 field ops. The WorkTypeBadge component correctly applies || WORK_TYPES[0] default so visually shows 'ميداني' but stats would be wrong. Fix: change to (e.work_type||'field')==='field'. Currently not affecting functionality since the existing employee (بسام) has work_type='field' explicitly set.
